title: Malaysian Shrimp and Shiitake Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy stir fry made with shrimp, shiitake mushrooms, and Malaysian seasonings.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add shrimp and cook until pink, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove shrimp from the wok and set aside.
Add another tablespoon of oil to the wok and cook the sliced shiitake mushrooms until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Add the cooked fried rice to the wok and stir to combine with the mushrooms.
Add the soy sauce and honey to the wok and stir to combine.
Return the cooked shrimp to the wok and stir to combine with the rice and mushroom mixture.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes until the ingredients are well combined and the shrimp are coated in the sauce.
Serve hot and garnish with chopped green onions if desired.
